summary: Rewrote validate-config-coherence.mjs from model-reference validation into SHA256-based config drift detection. Compares repo opencode-config/ against runtime ~/.config/opencode/ for CONFIG_FILES, CONFIG_DIRS, and MERGE_DIRS. Exports validateConfigCoherence() for programmatic use. Supports --json and --quiet CLI flags. MERGE_DIRS only check repo entries exist in runtime (user-custom entries preserved). Unblocks protocol-compliance-pass.mjs line 69 which calls bun run config:coherence.
